select.isEqual:
SELECT DISTINCT A.c_clubno, closestate, D.c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$ AS c_clubname, B.DISPLAYNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$ AS username, A.c_sysopid, applicationdate FROM TBL_C_COMCLOSE A INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON RTRIM(A.c_sysopid) = RTRIM(B.CN) AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id INNER JOIN TBL_C_CLUB D ON A.c_clubno = D.c_clubno AND A.tenant_id = D.tenant_id WHERE
B.DISPLAYNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$ LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_KEYWORD#, '%')
D.$v_S_RADIO$ LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_KEYWORD#, '%')
AND D.companyid = #companyID# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY applicationdate DESC
select.isNotEqual:
SELECT DISTINCT A.c_clubno, closestate, D.c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$ AS c_clubname, B.DISPLAYNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$ AS username, A.c_sysopid, applicationdate FROM TBL_C_COMCLOSE A INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON RTRIM(A.c_sysopid) = RTRIM(B.CN) AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id INNER JOIN TBL_C_CLUB D ON A.c_clubno = D.c_clubno AND A.tenant_id = D.tenant_id WHERE
B.DISPLAYNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$ LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_KEYWORD#, '%')
D.$v_S_RADIO$ LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_KEYWORD#, '%')
AND D.companyid = #companyID# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY $v_SORT1$ $v_SORT2$

select.isEqual: SELECT DISTINCT A.c_clubno, closestate, D.c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$ AS c_clubname, B.DISPLAYNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$ AS username, A.c_sysopid, applicationdate FROM TBL_C_COMCLOSE A INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON RTRIM(A.c_sysopid) = RTRIM(B.CN) AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id INNER JOIN TBL_C_CLUB D ON A.c_clubno = D.c_clubno AND A.tenant_id = D.tenant_id WHERE D.companyid = #companyID# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY applicationdate DESC
select.isNotEqual: SELECT DISTINCT A.c_clubno, closestate, D.c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$ AS c_clubname, B.DISPLAYNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$ AS username, A.c_sysopid, applicationdate FROM TBL_C_COMCLOSE A INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON RTRIM(A.c_sysopid) = RTRIM(B.CN) AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id INNER JOIN TBL_C_CLUB D ON A.c_clubno = D.c_clubno AND A.tenant_id = D.tenant_id WHERE D.companyid = #companyID# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY $v_SORT1$ $v_SORT2$

sqlMap.select:
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(DISTINCT C1.c_clubno), 0) FROM TBL_C_COMCLOSE as C1 INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON RTRIM(C1.c_sysopid) = RTRIM(B.CN) AND C1.tenant_id = B.tenant_id INNER JOIN TBL_C_CLUB ON TBL_C_CLUB.c_clubno = C1.c_clubno WHERE
B.DISPLAYNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_KEYWORD#, '%')
C1.$v_S_RADIO$ LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_KEYWORD#, '%')
AND TBL_C_CLUB.companyid = #companyID# AND C1.tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(DISTINCT C1.c_clubno), 0) FROM TBL_C_COMCLOSE as C1 INNER JOIN TBL_C_CLUB ON TBL_C_CLUB.c_clubno = C1.c_clubno WHERE TBL_C_CLUB.companyid = #companyID# AND C1.tenant_id = #tenantID#

select.isEqual: SELECT DISTINCT c_clubno, c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$ AS c_clubname, IFNULL(C.DISPLAYNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$, B.USERNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$) AS username, c_sysopid, c_regdate FROM TBL_C_CLUB A INNER JOIN TBL_C_MEMBERINFO B ON RTRIM(A.c_sysopid) = RTRIM(B.userid) AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER C ON A.c_sysopid = C.CN AND A.tenant_id = C.tenant_id WHERE $v_S_RADIO$ LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_KEYWORD#, '%') AND A.c_adminconfirm = 'N' AND A.companyid = #companyID# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY A.c_regdate DESC
select.isNotEqual: SELECT DISTINCT c_clubno, c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$ c_clubname, IFNULL(C.DISPLAYNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$, B.USERNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$) AS username, c_sysopid, c_regdate FROM TBL_C_CLUB A INNER JOIN TBL_C_MEMBERINFO B ON RTRIM(A.c_sysopid) = RTRIM(B.userid) AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER C ON A.c_sysopid = C.CN AND A.tenant_id = C.tenant_id WHERE $v_S_RADIO$ LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_KEYWORD#, '%') AND A.c_adminconfirm = 'N' AND A.companyid = #companyID# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY $v_SORT1$ $v_SORT2$

select.isEqual: SELECT DISTINCT c_clubno, c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$ AS c_clubname, IFNULL(C.DISPLAYNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$, B.USERNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$) AS username, c_sysopid, c_regdate FROM TBL_C_CLUB A INNER JOIN TBL_C_MEMBERINFO B ON RTRIM(A.c_sysopid) = B.userid AND A.c_adminconfirm = 'N' AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER C ON A.c_sysopid = C.CN AND A.tenant_id = C.tenant_id WHERE A.companyID = #companyID# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY A.c_regdate DESC
select.isNotEqual: SELECT c_clubno, c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$ AS c_clubname, IFNULL(C.DISPLAYNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$, B.USERNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$) AS username, c_sysopid, c_regdate FROM TBL_C_CLUB A INNER JOIN TBL_C_MEMBERINFO B ON RTRIM(A.c_sysopid) = RTRIM(B.userid) AND A.c_adminconfirm = 'N' AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER C ON A.c_sysopid = C.CN AND A.tenant_id = C.tenant_id WHERE A.companyID = #companyID# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY $v_SORT1$ $v_SORT2$

sqlMap.select: SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(DISTINCT c_clubno), 0) FROM TBL_C_CLUB A INNER JOIN TBL_C_MEMBERINFO B ON A.c_sysopid = B.userID AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER C ON A.c_sysopid = C.CN AND A.tenant_id = C.tenant_id WHERE $v_S_RADIO$ LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_KEYWORD#, '%') AND c_adminconfirm = 'N' AND A.companyid = #companyID# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(DISTINCT c_clubno), 0) FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE c_adminconfirm = 'N' AND companyid = #companyID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT * FROM (SELECT c_clubno, CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN c_clubname ELSE c_clubname2 END AS c_clubname, c_sysopid, c_clubdesc, c_regdate, DEPTID FROM TBL_C_CLUB A INNER JOIN ((SELECT D.CN, D.DEPARTMENT as DEPTID, D.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME as COMPANYID, D.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_USERMASTER D WHERE D.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND D.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyID#)
UNION ALL
(SELECT B.cn, A2.DEPTID, C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 as COMPANYID, A2.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_USERMASTER B INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A2 ON A2.CN = B.CN AND A2.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID RIGHT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON A2.DEPTID = C.CN AND B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID)) T ON A.C_SYSOPID = T.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = T.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = T.COMPANYID
WHERE c_clubno IN (SELECT c_clubno FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE c_clubdesc LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_STRQUERY#, '%') AND companyid = #companyID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#) AND c_adminconfirm = 'Y' AND A.companyid = #companyID# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID#
WHERE c_clubno IN (SELECT c_clubno FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN c_clubname ELSE c_clubname2 END LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_STRQUERY#, '%') AND companyid = #companyID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#) AND c_adminconfirm = 'Y' AND A.companyid = #companyID# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID#
WHERE c_adminconfirm = 'Y' AND A.companyid = #companyID# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID#
GROUP BY C_CLUBNO, C_SYSOPID ORDER BY c_regdate ASC LIMIT #v_IQUERYCOUNT#) T2 ORDER BY c_regdate DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(c_clubno), 0) FROM TBL_C_CLUB
WHERE c_clubno IN (SELECT c_clubno FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE c_clubdesc LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_STRQUERY#, '%') AND tenant_id = #tenantID#) AND c_adminconfirm = 'Y' AND companyid = #companyID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
WHERE c_clubno IN (SELECT c_clubno FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$ LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_STRQUERY#, '%') AND tenant_id = #tenantID#) AND c_adminconfirm = 'Y' AND companyid = #companyID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
WHERE c_adminconfirm = 'Y' AND companyid = #companyID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT c_sysopid, c_clubgubun, isin, c_clubdesc, c_clubconfirmtype, c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$ AS c_clubname, c_cate_a, c_cate_b, c_cate_c FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_C_CLUB SET c_cate_a = #v_C_CATE_A#, c_cate_b = #v_C_CATE_B#, c_cate_c = #v_C_CATE_C#, c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$ = #v_C_CLUBNAME#, isin = 2 WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT closereason FROM TBL_C_COMCLOSE WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT c_clubdesc FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_C_COMCLOSE SET closestate = #v_PCLOSESTATE# WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_C_CLUB SET c_adminconfirm = 'C' WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT B.email EMAIL, B.username$v_USERINFO_LANG$ USERNAME, A.c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$ C_CLUBNAME FROM TBL_C_CLUB A INNER JOIN TBL_C_MEMBERINFO B ON RTRIM(A.c_sysopid) = RTRIM(B.userid) AND A.companyid = B.companyid AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE RTRIM(A.c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_C_CLUB SET c_adminconfirm = 'Y' WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO USER (userid, usernm, passwd, empno, emptype, deptid, positionid, jobtitleid, status, email, mobiletel, officetel, fax, hometel, userintro, joindate, retiredate, totalmileage, recentmileage, seq, regdate, photopath, conlevel, subdeptid, roleinfo, tenant_id) VALUES (#v_CODE#, #v_COMNAME#, '', '', 'W', 'TOP', 1, 1, 'W', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, #v_pNow#, #v_pNow#, 0, 0, NULL, #v_pNow#, NULL, '', NULL, 'C', #tenantID#)
INSERT INTO ROLE (userid, roletype, tenant_id) VALUES (#v_CODE#, 'C', #tenantID#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT B.email EMAIL, B.username$v_USERINFO_LANG$ USERNAME, A.c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$ C_CLUBNAME FROM TBL_C_CLUB A INNER JOIN TBL_C_MEMBERINFO B ON RTRIM(A.c_sysopid) = RTRIM(B.userid) AND A.companyid = B.companyid AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE RTRIM(A.c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT IFNULL(CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN B.DISPLAYNAME ELSE B.DISPLAYNAME2 END, CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN A.username ELSE A.username2 END) AS username FROM TBL_C_MEMBERINFO A LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.userid = B.CN WHERE RTRIM(userid) = #v_ID# AND A.companyid = #companyID# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$ C_CLUBNAME FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
